drills.name: Form Shooting Progression
drills.description: One-hand form shots from three feet, adding the guide hand at five clean makes, then stepping back one pace per five makes out to the elbow.
drills.coachingPoints: Balance, eyes, elbow under the ball, hold the follow-through.

drills.name: Catch-and-Shoot Spots
drills.description: Passer under the rim feeds shooters rotating through five perimeter spots. Shooter shows hands ready, catches on the hop, and shoots in rhythm. Five makes per spot.
drills.coachingPoints: Feet set and hands up before the pass arrives — catch already loaded.

drills.name: One-Dribble Pull-Ups
drills.description: From the wing, attack a cone with one hard dribble either direction and rise into a pull-up jumper. Five makes going left, five going right, rotate lines.
drills.coachingPoints: One hard dribble to your spot, then straight up — don't drift.

drills.name: Free Throw Pressure Pairs
drills.description: Partners alternate free throws in a race to ten makes; a miss subtracts one. Between turns the waiting partner does defensive slides to keep legs game-tired.
drills.coachingPoints: Same routine every time — breathe, dip, and finish high.

drills.name: Two-Ball Stationary Handling
drills.description: Every player with two balls: pound dribbles together, alternating, high-low, then one-ball crossovers with the weak hand doing double reps. Thirty seconds per pattern.
drills.coachingPoints: Pound it hard and keep your eyes off the ball the whole time.

drills.name: Cone Change-of-Direction Series
drills.description: Dribble a line of four cones executing a called move at each — crossover, between the legs, behind the back — and finish with a layup. Return with the weak hand leading.
drills.coachingPoints: Change speed with the change of direction — the move is the setup, the burst is the escape.

drills.name: Full-Court 1v1 Pressure Dribble
drills.description: Ball handler advances the ball full court against a defender applying live pressure. No help, no time limit — cross half court under control, then swap roles coming back.
drills.coachingPoints: Stay low, protect with your body, and change pace to break the pressure.

drills.name: Partner Pass Series
drills.description: Pairs 12 feet apart cycle chest passes, bounce passes, and one-hand off-the-move passes, 15 each, stepping into every throw. Finish with a rapid-fire 30-second round.
drills.coachingPoints: Step to your target and snap it — thumbs down on the follow-through.

drills.name: Three-Man Weave
drills.description: Three lines run the full-court weave — pass and cut behind two — finishing with a layup, then weave back the other way. Add a make-it-or-repeat rule once it's clean.
drills.coachingPoints: Pass ahead of the runner and sprint behind two — hit them in stride.

drills.name: Entry Pass vs Denial
drills.description: Wing works to get open against a live denying defender; passer at the top must deliver a clean entry with a pass fake first. Three completions, rotate all three spots.
drills.coachingPoints: Fake a pass to make a pass — hit the hand away from the defender.

drills.name: Drive-and-Kick Reads
drills.description: Driver attacks the paint off the dribble while two teammates space to the corner and wing; a coach-controlled helper takes away one option and the driver kicks to the open man for a shot.
drills.coachingPoints: Drive with your eyes up — the help defender tells you who's open.

drills.name: Zig-Zag Defensive Slides
drills.description: Defenders slide a zig-zag pattern up the court between cones, chopping feet and swinging through at each cone, then sprint back on the whistle.
drills.coachingPoints: Nose behind the ball line, low hips, push off the back foot — never cross your feet.

drills.name: Shell Drill 4v4
drills.description: Four offensive players pass around the perimeter while four defenders jump to ball-you-man positions on every pass. Progress from no drives to live drives with help.
drills.coachingPoints: Move on the pass, not the catch — see your man and the ball on every swing.

drills.name: Closeout Reps
drills.description: Defender starts in the paint, sprints at a shooter receiving a pass on the wing, and breaks down into a high-hand closeout, then contains one live dribble.
drills.coachingPoints: Sprint two-thirds, chop the last third — high hand to the shot, don't fly by.

drills.name: Screen Navigation 2v2
drills.description: Offense runs live ball screens and off-ball screens; on-ball defender works over or under on the coach's call while the screener's defender hedges or drops and both talk it through.
drills.coachingPoints: Call the screen early — yell it before it hits, then fight over the top.

drills.name: Box Out Battles
drills.description: Coach shoots; the defender makes contact, boxes out, and pursues the rebound while the partner fights to get around. Ball live until someone secures it. Winner stays on offense.
drills.coachingPoints: Hit first — find your man, make contact, then go get the ball.

drills.name: Backboard Put-Backs
drills.description: Player tosses the ball off the backboard to themselves, rebounds at the peak, and scores immediately without bringing the ball down. Five makes each side of the rim.
drills.coachingPoints: Catch it high and go right back up — the ball never comes below your chin.

drills.name: Long Rebound Chase and Outlet
drills.description: Coach fires shots that miss long; two players read the carom, chase it down, and the winner pivots and hits an outlet target sprinting the wing.
drills.coachingPoints: Long shot, long rebound — anticipate the carom and go get it at full speed.

drills.name: Five-Out Ball Movement
drills.description: Five players in five-out spacing move the ball with a two-second limit per catch: pass and cut, fill the open spot, no dribbling. Coach calls shot to end each possession.
drills.coachingPoints: Catch, see the rim, move it — the ball finds the open man faster than the dribble.

drills.name: Continuous 3v2 to 2v1
drills.description: Three attack two defenders down the floor; on the make or stop, the two defenders outlet and attack the other way against one retreating attacker. Runs continuously.
drills.coachingPoints: Sprint wide lanes and make the defense commit before you pass.
